title: Policy: Policy Applied - Settings Locked
scenario: Policy-applied settings remain locked and update correctly when policy values are changed via Lens Cloud tenant on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. On the Lens Cloud tenant, create a policy that locks one or more settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) and apply it to the target device.
2. On the Poly Studio Mobile app, navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
3. Verify that the affected settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) appear greyed out / locked and cannot be toggled or adjusted.
6. On the Lens Cloud tenant, update the policy with new values for the locked settings (e.g., change ANC level, Equalizer preset) and re-apply the policy to the device.
7. On the Poly Studio Mobile app, navigate back to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
8. Verify that the locked settings now reflect the updated values from the policy while remaining greyed out / locked.
9. Repeat steps 1–8 for scenarios where a single setting, a few settings, or all available settings are locked.
expected: Locked settings are greyed out and non-interactive. Tapping a locked setting shows a dialog informing the user that the setting is locked by policy. When the policy is updated, the settings update to the new values while remaining locked.
